name: com.nino.quadsim
description: Importable QuadSim scenes with sample maps, terrain assets, prefabs, drone assets, and scene config.

samples.description: Importable QuadSim scenes that reference the base runtime maps, prefabs, drone assets, and scene config.
PX4 bridge, confirmation script, offboard validation mission, requirements, and setup documentation.
Standalone headless visualization and utility tools such as the live UDP viewer.
